title: [circt-verilog] Nightly Valgrind Vailure
body:
There was a nightly valgrind failure originating from recent updates to circt-verilog: https://github.com/llvm/circt/actions/runs/15757355710/job/44415652443#step:6:5580

```
******************** TEST 'CIRCT :: circt-verilog/registers.sv' FAILED ********************
Exit Code: 123

Command Output (stderr):
--
/__w/circt/circt/build/bin/circt-verilog /__w/circt/circt/test/circt-verilog/registers.sv | /__w/circt/circt/build/bin/FileCheck /__w/circt/circt/test/circt-verilog/registers.sv # RUN: at line 1
+ /__w/circt/circt/build/bin/circt-verilog /__w/circt/circt/test/circt-verilog/registers.sv
+ /__w/circt/circt/build/bin/FileCheck /__w/circt/circt/test/circt-verilog/registers.sv
==21855== Conditional jump or move depends on uninitialised value(s)
==21855==    at 0x102DD96: slang::ast::SemanticFacts::populateTimeScale(std::optional<slang::TimeScale>&, slang::ast::Scope const&, std::optional<slang::TimeScale>, std::optional<slang::SourceRange>, std::optional<slang::SourceRange>) (in /__w/circt/circt/build/bin/circt-verilog)
==21855==    by 0xFEC035: slang::ast::Definition::Definition(slang::ast::Scope const&, slang::ast::LookupLocation, slang::syntax::ModuleDeclarationSyntax const&, slang::ast::NetType const&, slang::ast::UnconnectedDrive, std::optional<slang::TimeScale>, slang::syntax::SyntaxTree const*) (in /__w/circt/circt/build/bin/circt-verilog)
==21855==    by 0xF6E760: slang::ast::Compilation::createDefinition(slang::ast::Scope const&, slang::ast::LookupLocation, slang::syntax::ModuleDeclarationSyntax const&) (in /__w/circt/circt/build/bin/circt-verilog)
==21855==    by 0x1020B50: slang::ast::Scope::addMembers(slang::syntax::SyntaxNode const&) (in /__w/circt/circt/build/bin/circt-verilog)
==21855==    by 0xF6B75B: slang::ast::Compilation::addSyntaxTree(std::shared_ptr<slang::syntax::SyntaxTree>) (in /__w/circt/circt/build/bin/circt-verilog)
==21855==    by 0xCFBA9B: slang::driver::Driver::createCompilation() const (in /__w/circt/circt/build/bin/circt-verilog)
==21855==    by 0x7EFFE7: circt::importVerilog(llvm::SourceMgr&, mlir::MLIRContext*, mlir::TimingScope&, mlir::ModuleOp, circt::ImportVerilogOptions const*) (in /__w/circt/circt/build/bin/circt-verilog)
==21855==    by 0x68FDD1: executeWithSources(mlir::MLIRContext*, llvm::SourceMgr&) (in /__w/circt/circt/build/bin/circt-verilog)
==21855==    by 0x68B364: execute(mlir::MLIRContext*) (in /__w/circt/circt/build/bin/circt-verilog)
==21855==    by 0x68AA2E: main (in /__w/circt/circt/build/bin/circt-verilog)
==21855== 
==21855== Conditional jump or move depends on uninitialised value(s)
==21855==    at 0x102DDB3: slang::ast::SemanticFacts::populateTimeScale(std::optional<slang::TimeScale>&, slang::ast::Scope const&, std::optional<slang::TimeScale>, std::optional<slang::SourceRange>, std::optional<slang::SourceRange>) (in /__w/circt/circt/build/bin/circt-verilog)
==21855==    by 0xFEC035: slang::ast::Definition::Definition(slang::ast::Scope const&, slang::ast::LookupLocation, slang::syntax::ModuleDeclarationSyntax const&, slang::ast::NetType const&, slang::ast::UnconnectedDrive, std::optional<slang::TimeScale>, slang::syntax::SyntaxTree const*) (in /__w/circt/circt/build/bin/circt-verilog)
==21855==    by 0xF6E760: slang::ast::Compilation::createDefinition(slang::ast::Scope const&, slang::ast::LookupLocation, slang::syntax::ModuleDeclarationSyntax const&) (in /__w/circt/circt/build/bin/circt-verilog)
==21855==    by 0x1020B50: slang::ast::Scope::addMembers(slang::syntax::SyntaxNode const&) (in /__w/circt/circt/build/bin/circt-verilog)
==21855==    by 0xF6B75B: slang::ast::Compilation::addSyntaxTree(std::shared_ptr<slang::syntax::SyntaxTree>) (in /__w/circt/circt/build/bin/circt-verilog)
==21855==    by 0xCFBA9B: slang::driver::Driver::createCompilation() const (in /__w/circt/circt/build/bin/circt-verilog)
==21855==    by 0x7EFFE7: circt::importVerilog(llvm::SourceMgr&, mlir::MLIRContext*, mlir::TimingScope&, mlir::ModuleOp, circt::ImportVerilogOptions const*) (in /__w/circt/circt/build/bin/circt-verilog)

==21855== 

--

********************
```
